ogTitle: Boigu Island vs Bokarina: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Boigu Island and Bokarina.
heading: Boigu Island vs Bokarina — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Boigu Island, Queensland and Bokarina, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Boigu Island has a lower overall climate risk score (26/100) compared to Bokarina (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Boigu Island or Bokarina safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Boigu Island has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Bokarina scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Boigu Island scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Bokarina scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Boigu Island or Bokarina?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Boigu Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
